query: 查询2010年12月的所有订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', invoice_date) = '2010-12';

query: 查询来自英国的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE country = 'United Kingdom';

query: 查询单价大于10的商品
sql: SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE unit_price > 10;

query: 查询订单号为536365的订单详情
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE invoice_no = '536365';

query: 查询商品代码为85123A的商品信息
sql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE stock_code = '85123A';

query: 查询购买数量大于10的订单明细
sql: SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE quantity > 10;

query: 查询单价在2到5之间的商品
sql: SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE unit_price BETWEEN 2 AND 5;

query: 查询商品描述包含HEART的商品
sql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE description LIKE '%HEART%';

query: 查询来自法国、德国、西班牙的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE country IN ('France', 'Germany', 'Spain');

query: 查询客户ID为17850的所有订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id = '17850';

query: 查询购买数量为6的订单明细
sql: SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE quantity = 6;

query: 查询商品描述包含BOX的所有商品
sql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE description LIKE '%BOX%';

query: 查询单价小于1的商品明细
sql: SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE unit_price < 1;

query: 查询2010年的所有订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', invoice_date) = '2010';

query: 查询商品描述以WHITE开头的商品
sql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE description LIKE 'WHITE%';

query: 统计每个国家的订单数量
sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY country;

query: 计算所有订单的总销售额
sql: SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) as total_amount FROM order_items;

query: 计算每个商品的平均单价
sql: SELECT stock_code, AVG(unit_price) as avg_price FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code;

query: 统计每个月的订单数量
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', invoice_date) as month, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY month;

query: 计算每个客户的订单总金额
sql: SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id;

query: 统计每个国家的客户数量
sql: SELECT country, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as customer_count FROM orders GROUP BY country;

query: 计算每个订单的总金额
sql: SELECT invoice_no, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as total_amount FROM order_items GROUP BY invoice_no;

query: 统计每个商品的销售数量
sql: SELECT stock_code, SUM(quantity) as total_quantity FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code;

query: 计算单价的最大值和最小值
sql: SELECT MAX(unit_price) as max_price, MIN(unit_price) as min_price FROM order_items;

query: 统计总客户数
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as total_customers FROM orders;

query: 统计总订单数
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders FROM orders;

query: 计算每个国家的平均订单金额
sql: SELECT o.country, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as avg_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.country;

query: 统计每个商品的订单数量
sql: SELECT stock_code, COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_no) as order_count FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code;

query: 计算购买数量的平均值
sql: SELECT AVG(quantity) as avg_quantity FROM order_items;

query: 统计不同商品的总数
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stock_code) as product_count FROM products;

query: 查询销售额最高的10个商品
sql: SELECT stock_code, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as total FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询单价最高的5个商品
sql: SELECT * FROM order_items ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 5;

query: 查询购买数量最多的10个订单
sql: SELECT invoice_no, SUM(quantity) as total_quantity FROM order_items GROUP BY invoice_no ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询订单数量最多的5个国家
sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY country ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5;

query: 查询消费金额最高的10个客户
sql: SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spent FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询销售数量最少的10个商品
sql: SELECT stock_code, SUM(quantity) as total_quantity FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code ORDER BY total_quantity ASC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询平均订单金额最高的5个国家
sql: SELECT o.country, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as avg_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.country ORDER BY avg_amount DESC LIMIT 5;

query: 查询最早的5个订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY invoice_date ASC LIMIT 5;

query: 查询最近的5个订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY invoice_date DESC LIMIT 5;

query: 查询购买商品种类最多的10个客户
sql: SELECT o.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.stock_code) as product_variety FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id ORDER BY product_variety DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询2010年12月1日的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', invoice_date) = '2010-12-01';

query: 查询本周的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE STRFTIME('%W', invoice_date) = STRFTIME('%W', 'now');

query: 查询上午8点到10点之间的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE CAST(STRFTIME('%H', invoice_date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 8 AND 10;

query: 查询12月份的订单总额
sql: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE STRFTIME('%m', o.invoice_date) = '12';

query: 查询2010年第四季度的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE invoice_date BETWEEN '2010-10-01' AND '2010-12-31';

query: 统计每天的订单数量
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', invoice_date) as day, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY day;

query: 查询每个小时的订单数量
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%H', invoice_date) as hour, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY hour;

query: 查询订单日期在2010年12月1日到15日之间的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE invoice_date BETWEEN '2010-12-01' AND '2010-12-15';

query: 查询2010年每个月的销售额
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) as month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', o.invoice_date) = '2010' GROUP BY month;

query: 查询最近7天的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE invoice_date >= DATE('now', '-7 days');

query: 查询2010年12月销售额最高的10个商品及其描述
sql: SELECT p.stock_code, p.description, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no JOIN products p ON oi.stock_code = p.stock_code WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) = '2010-12' GROUP BY p.stock_code ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询购买过商品85123A的所有客户信息
sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id, o.country FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE oi.stock_code = '85123A';

query: 查询每个国家在2010年12月的订单数和总销售额
sql: SELECT o.country, COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as order_count, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) = '2010-12' GROUP BY o.country;

query: 查询订单数量超过5的客户及其订单总额
sql: SELECT o.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as order_count, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id HAVING order_count > 5;

query: 查询每个商品在不同国家的销售数量
sql: SELECT oi.stock_code, o.country, SUM(oi.quantity) as total_quantity FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no GROUP BY oi.stock_code, o.country;

query: 查询平均订单金额超过100的国家
sql: SELECT o.country, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as avg_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.country HAVING avg_amount > 100;

query: 查询购买过3个以上不同商品的客户
sql: SELECT o.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.stock_code) as product_count FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id HAVING product_count >= 3;

query: 查询每个月的销售额增长趋势
sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) as month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as monthly_total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

query: 查询英国客户购买的所有商品及数量
sql: SELECT p.stock_code, p.description, SUM(oi.quantity) as total_quantity FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no JOIN products p ON oi.stock_code = p.stock_code WHERE o.country = 'United Kingdom' GROUP BY p.stock_code;

query: 查询单笔订单金额超过平均值的订单
sql: SELECT oi.invoice_no, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total FROM order_items oi GROUP BY oi.invoice_no HAVING total > (SELECT AVG(order_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) as order_total FROM order_items GROUP BY invoice_no));

query: 查询每个客户的首次购买时间和总消费
sql: SELECT o.customer_id, MIN(o.invoice_date) as first_order_date, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id;

query: 查询在多个国家都有销售的商品
sql: SELECT oi.stock_code, COUNT(DISTINCT o.country) as country_count FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no GROUP BY oi.stock_code HAVING country_count > 1;

query: 查询客户17850在所有订单中购买的不同商品数量
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.stock_code) as unique_products FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE o.customer_id = '17850';

query: 查询每个国家销售额占比
sql: SELECT o.country, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as country_total, (SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) FROM order_items)) as percentage FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.country;

query: 查询同一天内下单超过2次的客户
sql: SELECT customer_id, STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', invoice_date) as order_date, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id, order_date HAVING order_count > 2;

query: 查询所有有客户ID的订单
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL;

query: 查询客户ID为空的订单数量
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as null_customer_count FROM orders WHERE customer_id IS NULL;

query: 查询所有不重复的国家列表
sql: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM orders ORDER BY country;

query: 查询订单金额为0或负数的异常订单
sql: SELECT oi.invoice_no, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total FROM order_items oi GROUP BY oi.invoice_no HAVING total <= 0;

query: 查询所有客户及其订单数量，包括没有订单的客户
sql: SELECT c.customer_id, COUNT(o.invoice_no) as order_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id;

query: 根据单价将商品分为高中低档
sql: SELECT stock_code, unit_price, CASE WHEN unit_price > 10 THEN '高档' WHEN unit_price > 5 THEN '中档' ELSE '低档' END as price_level FROM order_items;

query: 查询购买数量为负数的退货记录
sql: SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE quantity < 0;

query: 查询商品描述为空的商品
sql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE description IS NULL OR description = '';

query: 统计每个订单的商品种类数量，包括单一商品订单
sql: SELECT invoice_no, COUNT(DISTINCT stock_code) as product_types FROM order_items GROUP BY invoice_no;

query: 给每个订单按金额排名
sql: WITH order_totals AS (SELECT invoice_no, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as total FROM order_items GROUP BY invoice_no) SELECT invoice_no, total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total DESC) as rank FROM order_totals;

query: 查询每个国家内订单金额排名前3的订单
sql: WITH order_amounts AS (SELECT o.invoice_no, o.country, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.invoice_no, o.country), ranked_orders AS (SELECT invoice_no, country, total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country ORDER BY total DESC) as rank FROM order_amounts) SELECT * FROM ranked_orders WHERE rank <= 3;

query: 计算每个客户的累计消费金额
sql: WITH customer_orders AS (SELECT o.customer_id, o.invoice_date, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as order_amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id, o.invoice_no, o.invoice_date) SELECT customer_id, invoice_date, order_amount, SUM(order_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY invoice_date) as cumulative_amount FROM customer_orders;
business_scenario: 客户生命周期价值(LTV)分析

query: 查询每个商品的销售额及其在所有商品中的排名
sql: WITH product_sales AS (SELECT stock_code, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as total_sales FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code) SELECT stock_code, total_sales, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) as sales_rank, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) as dense_rank FROM product_sales;

query: 计算每个月的销售额及环比增长率
sql: WITH monthly_sales AS (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) as month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as sales FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY month) SELECT month, sales, LAG(sales) OVER (ORDER BY month) as prev_month_sales, ROUND((sales - LAG(sales) OVER (ORDER BY month)) * 100.0 / LAG(sales) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2) as growth_rate FROM monthly_sales;

query: 查询每个客户的第一笔订单和最后一笔订单的时间差
sql: WITH customer_order_dates AS (SELECT customer_id, invoice_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY invoice_date) as first_order, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY invoice_date DESC) as last_order FROM orders) SELECT DISTINCT customer_id, (SELECT invoice_date FROM customer_order_dates WHERE customer_id = cod.customer_id AND first_order = 1) as first_order_date, (SELECT invoice_date FROM customer_order_dates WHERE customer_id = cod.customer_id AND last_order = 1) as last_order_date FROM customer_order_dates cod;

query: 计算每个商品最近7次交易的平均销售额
sql: WITH product_transactions AS (SELECT stock_code, invoice_date, quantity * unit_price as amount FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no) SELECT stock_code, invoice_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY invoice_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as moving_avg_7 FROM product_transactions;

query: 将客户按消费金额分为5个等级
sql: WITH customer_spending AS (SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spent FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id) SELECT customer_id, total_spent, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY total_spent DESC) as spending_tier FROM customer_spending;

query: 查询每个国家每月的销售额及当月在该国的排名
sql: WITH country_monthly_sales AS (SELECT o.country, STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) as month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as sales FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.country, month) SELECT country, month, sales, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY country ORDER BY sales DESC) as monthly_rank_in_country FROM country_monthly_sales;

query: 查询每个商品的下一次被购买的时间
sql: WITH product_purchase_dates AS (SELECT DISTINCT stock_code, invoice_date FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no) SELECT stock_code, invoice_date, LEAD(invoice_date) OVER (PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY invoice_date) as next_purchase_date FROM product_purchase_dates;

query: 使用CTE查询高价值客户及其订单详情
sql: WITH high_value_customers AS (SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spent FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id HAVING total_spent > 10000) SELECT o.invoice_no, o.customer_id, o.invoice_date, hvc.total_spent FROM orders o JOIN high_value_customers hvc ON o.customer_id = hvc.customer_id ORDER BY hvc.total_spent DESC;

query: 使用多层CTE分析客户购买频次和金额
sql: WITH customer_metrics AS (SELECT o.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as order_count, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spent FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id), customer_segments AS (SELECT customer_id, order_count, total_spent, CASE WHEN order_count >= 10 AND total_spent > 5000 THEN '高频高额' WHEN order_count >= 10 THEN '高频低额' WHEN total_spent > 5000 THEN '低频高额' ELSE '低频低额' END as segment FROM customer_metrics) SELECT segment, COUNT(*) as customer_count, AVG(order_count) as avg_orders, AVG(total_spent) as avg_spent FROM customer_segments GROUP BY segment;

query: 查询每个国家的新客户占比
sql: WITH first_orders AS (SELECT customer_id, MIN(invoice_date) as first_order_date FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id), monthly_new_customers AS (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', first_order_date) as month, COUNT(*) as new_customers FROM first_orders GROUP BY month), monthly_all_customers AS (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', invoice_date) as month, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as all_customers FROM orders GROUP BY month) SELECT mnc.month, mnc.new_customers, mac.all_customers, ROUND(mnc.new_customers * 100.0 / mac.all_customers, 2) as new_customer_rate FROM monthly_new_customers mnc JOIN monthly_all_customers mac ON mnc.month = mac.month;

query: 使用CTE计算客户流失率
sql: WITH customer_last_order AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(invoice_date) as last_order_date FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id), active_customers AS (SELECT customer_id FROM customer_last_order WHERE JULIANDAY('2011-12-31') - JULIANDAY(last_order_date) <= 90), churned_customers AS (SELECT customer_id FROM customer_last_order WHERE JULIANDAY('2011-12-31') - JULIANDAY(last_order_date) > 90) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM churned_customers) as churned_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_last_order) as total_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM churned_customers) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_last_order), 2) as churn_rate;

query: 使用CTE分析商品关联购买
sql: WITH product_pairs AS (SELECT oi1.stock_code as product_a, oi2.stock_code as product_b, COUNT(DISTINCT oi1.invoice_no) as co_purchase_count FROM order_items oi1 JOIN order_items oi2 ON oi1.invoice_no = oi2.invoice_no AND oi1.stock_code < oi2.stock_code GROUP BY oi1.stock_code, oi2.stock_code) SELECT product_a, product_b, co_purchase_count FROM product_pairs WHERE co_purchase_count >= 5 ORDER BY co_purchase_count DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 查询购买了相同商品的不同客户
sql: SELECT DISTINCT o1.customer_id as customer1, o2.customer_id as customer2, oi1.stock_code FROM orders o1 JOIN order_items oi1 ON o1.invoice_no = oi1.invoice_no JOIN orders o2 ON o2.customer_id > o1.customer_id JOIN order_items oi2 ON o2.invoice_no = oi2.invoice_no AND oi1.stock_code = oi2.stock_code LIMIT 100;

query: 查询同一客户在不同订单中购买的商品对
sql: SELECT o1.customer_id, oi1.stock_code as product1, oi2.stock_code as product2, COUNT(*) as pair_count FROM orders o1 JOIN order_items oi1 ON o1.invoice_no = oi1.invoice_no JOIN orders o2 ON o1.customer_id = o2.customer_id AND o1.invoice_no < o2.invoice_no JOIN order_items oi2 ON o2.invoice_no = oi2.invoice_no WHERE oi1.stock_code < oi2.stock_code GROUP BY o1.customer_id, oi1.stock_code, oi2.stock_code HAVING pair_count >= 2;

query: 查询在同一天内发生的订单对
sql: SELECT o1.invoice_no as order1, o2.invoice_no as order2, STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', o1.invoice_date) as order_date FROM orders o1 JOIN orders o2 ON o1.customer_id = o2.customer_id AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', o1.invoice_date) = STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', o2.invoice_date) AND o1.invoice_no < o2.invoice_no LIMIT 50;

query: 生成每个国家按月的销售额透视表
sql: SELECT country, SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%m', o.invoice_date) = '10' THEN oi.quantity * oi.unit_price ELSE 0 END) as Oct, SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%m', o.invoice_date) = '11' THEN oi.quantity * oi.unit_price ELSE 0 END) as Nov, SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%m', o.invoice_date) = '12' THEN oi.quantity * oi.unit_price ELSE 0 END) as Dec FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', o.invoice_date) = '2010' GROUP BY country;

query: 按时间段统计每个国家的订单分布
sql: SELECT country, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(STRFTIME('%H', invoice_date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 0 AND 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as morning, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(STRFTIME('%H', invoice_date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 8 AND 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as afternoon, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(STRFTIME('%H', invoice_date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 16 AND 23 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as evening FROM orders GROUP BY country;

query: 查询购买过所有畅销商品的客户
sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT stock_code FROM (SELECT stock_code FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code ORDER BY SUM(quantity) DESC LIMIT 10) top_products WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi2 JOIN orders o2 ON oi2.invoice_no = o2.invoice_no WHERE o2.customer_id = o.customer_id AND oi2.stock_code = top_products.stock_code));

query: 查询从未购买过高价商品的客户
sql: SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE oi.unit_price > 10);

query: 查询销售额超过所属国家平均水平的订单
sql: WITH order_amounts AS (SELECT o.invoice_no, o.country, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.invoice_no, o.country), country_avg AS (SELECT country, AVG(amount) as avg_amount FROM order_amounts GROUP BY country) SELECT oa.invoice_no, oa.country, oa.amount FROM order_amounts oa JOIN country_avg ca ON oa.country = ca.country WHERE oa.amount > ca.avg_amount;

query: 查询既购买过商品A又购买过商品B的客户
sql: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE oi.stock_code = '85123A' INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE oi.stock_code = '71053';

query: 查询只在英国有订单但在其他国家没有订单的客户
sql: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders WHERE country = 'United Kingdom' EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders WHERE country != 'United Kingdom';

query: 合并2010年10月和11月的订单统计
sql: SELECT '2010-10' as month, COUNT(*) as order_count, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_sales FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) = '2010-10' UNION ALL SELECT '2010-11' as month, COUNT(*) as order_count, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_sales FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) = '2010-11';

query: 计算每个客户的RFM指标
sql: WITH customer_rfm AS (SELECT o.customer_id, JULIANDAY('2011-12-31') - JULIANDAY(MAX(o.invoice_date)) as recency, COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as frequency, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as monetary FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id) SELECT customer_id, recency, frequency, monetary, CASE WHEN recency <= 30 THEN 5 WHEN recency <= 60 THEN 4 WHEN recency <= 90 THEN 3 WHEN recency <= 180 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END as r_score, CASE WHEN frequency >= 20 THEN 5 WHEN frequency >= 10 THEN 4 WHEN frequency >= 5 THEN 3 WHEN frequency >= 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END as f_score, CASE WHEN monetary >= 5000 THEN 5 WHEN monetary >= 2000 THEN 4 WHEN monetary >= 1000 THEN 3 WHEN monetary >= 500 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END as m_score FROM customer_rfm;

query: 计算月度客户留存率
sql: WITH first_purchase AS (SELECT customer_id, STRFTIME('%Y-%m', MIN(invoice_date)) as cohort_month FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id), monthly_activity AS (SELECT customer_id, STRFTIME('%Y-%m', invoice_date) as activity_month FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id, activity_month) SELECT fp.cohort_month, COUNT(DISTINCT fp.customer_id) as cohort_size, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.activity_month = fp.cohort_month THEN fp.customer_id END) as month_0, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN CAST((JULIANDAY(ma.activity_month || '-01') - JULIANDAY(fp.cohort_month || '-01')) / 30 AS INTEGER) = 1 THEN fp.customer_id END) as month_1, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN CAST((JULIANDAY(ma.activity_month || '-01') - JULIANDAY(fp.cohort_month || '-01')) / 30 AS INTEGER) = 2 THEN fp.customer_id END) as month_2 FROM first_purchase fp LEFT JOIN monthly_activity ma ON fp.customer_id = ma.customer_id GROUP BY fp.cohort_month;

query: 计算每周订单量的周环比增长
sql: WITH weekly_orders AS (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-W%W', invoice_date) as week, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY week) SELECT week, order_count, LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY week) as prev_week, ROUND((order_count - LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY week)) * 100.0 / LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY week), 2) as week_over_week_growth FROM weekly_orders;

query: 计算每个商品的7天移动平均销量
sql: WITH daily_product_sales AS (SELECT stock_code, STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', o.invoice_date) as sale_date, SUM(oi.quantity) as daily_quantity FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no GROUP BY stock_code, sale_date) SELECT stock_code, sale_date, daily_quantity, AVG(daily_quantity) OVER (PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_7_days FROM daily_product_sales;

query: 计算每个客户的复购率
sql: WITH customer_orders AS (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_no) as total_orders FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT CASE WHEN total_orders = 1 THEN '一次性客户' WHEN total_orders BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '低频复购' WHEN total_orders BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '中频复购' ELSE '高频复购' END as customer_type, COUNT(*) as customer_count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_orders), 2) as percentage FROM customer_orders GROUP BY customer_type;

query: 查找频繁一起购买的商品组合（支持度>5%）
sql: WITH total_orders AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_no) as total FROM order_items), product_pairs AS (SELECT oi1.stock_code as product_a, oi2.stock_code as product_b, COUNT(DISTINCT oi1.invoice_no) as pair_count FROM order_items oi1 JOIN order_items oi2 ON oi1.invoice_no = oi2.invoice_no AND oi1.stock_code < oi2.stock_code GROUP BY oi1.stock_code, oi2.stock_code) SELECT product_a, product_b, pair_count, ROUND(pair_count * 100.0 / (SELECT total FROM total_orders), 2) as support FROM product_pairs WHERE pair_count * 100.0 / (SELECT total FROM total_orders) > 5 ORDER BY support DESC;

query: 基于消费行为的客户细分
sql: WITH customer_behavior AS (SELECT o.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as order_count, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spent, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as avg_order_value, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.stock_code) as product_variety, JULIANDAY('2011-12-31') - JULIANDAY(MAX(o.invoice_date)) as days_since_last_order FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id) SELECT CASE WHEN days_since_last_order <= 30 AND total_spent > 5000 THEN 'VIP活跃客户' WHEN days_since_last_order <= 30 THEN '普通活跃客户' WHEN days_since_last_order <= 90 AND total_spent > 5000 THEN 'VIP沉睡客户' WHEN days_since_last_order <= 90 THEN '普通沉睡客户' ELSE '流失客户' END as segment, COUNT(*) as customer_count, AVG(total_spent) as avg_spent, AVG(order_count) as avg_orders FROM customer_behavior GROUP BY segment;

query: 检测异常高额订单（超过3倍标准差）
sql: WITH order_stats AS (SELECT AVG(order_total) as avg_total, (AVG(order_total * order_total) - AVG(order_total) * AVG(order_total)) as variance FROM (SELECT invoice_no, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as order_total FROM order_items GROUP BY invoice_no)), order_amounts AS (SELECT invoice_no, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as total FROM order_items GROUP BY invoice_no) SELECT oa.invoice_no, oa.total, os.avg_total, SQRT(os.variance) as std_dev FROM order_amounts oa, order_stats os WHERE oa.total > os.avg_total + 3 * SQRT(os.variance);

query: 分析商品的生命周期阶段
sql: WITH product_monthly_sales AS (SELECT stock_code, STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) as month, SUM(oi.quantity) as monthly_sales FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no GROUP BY stock_code, month), product_trends AS (SELECT stock_code, month, monthly_sales, LAG(monthly_sales, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY month) as prev_month_1, LAG(monthly_sales, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY month) as prev_month_2 FROM product_monthly_sales) SELECT stock_code, month, monthly_sales, CASE WHEN prev_month_1 IS NULL OR prev_month_2 IS NULL THEN '导入期' WHEN monthly_sales > prev_month_1 AND prev_month_1 > prev_month_2 THEN '成长期' WHEN monthly_sales >= prev_month_1 * 0.9 AND monthly_sales <= prev_month_1 * 1.1 THEN '成熟期' ELSE '衰退期' END as lifecycle_stage FROM product_trends WHERE prev_month_1 IS NOT NULL AND prev_month_2 IS NOT NULL;

query: 计算累计收入占比（帕累托分析）
sql: WITH product_revenue AS (SELECT stock_code, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as revenue FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code), ranked_products AS (SELECT stock_code, revenue, SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) as cumulative_revenue, SUM(revenue) OVER () as total_revenue FROM product_revenue) SELECT stock_code, revenue, ROUND(revenue * 100.0 / total_revenue, 2) as revenue_percentage, ROUND(cumulative_revenue * 100.0 / total_revenue, 2) as cumulative_percentage FROM ranked_products ORDER BY revenue DESC;

query: 预测客户生命周期价值（CLV）
sql: WITH customer_metrics AS (SELECT o.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as purchase_count, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_revenue, (JULIANDAY(MAX(o.invoice_date)) - JULIANDAY(MIN(o.invoice_date))) / 365.0 as customer_lifespan_years, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) / COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id HAVING customer_lifespan_years > 0) SELECT customer_id, purchase_count, total_revenue, ROUND(customer_lifespan_years, 2) as lifespan_years, ROUND(avg_order_value, 2) as avg_order_value, ROUND(purchase_count / customer_lifespan_years, 2) as purchase_frequency_per_year, ROUND((purchase_count / customer_lifespan_years) * avg_order_value * 3, 2) as predicted_clv_3years FROM customer_metrics WHERE purchase_count >= 2;

query: 计算商品关联规则的置信度
sql: WITH product_counts AS (SELECT stock_code, COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_no) as product_count FROM order_items GROUP BY stock_code), pair_counts AS (SELECT oi1.stock_code as product_a, oi2.stock_code as product_b, COUNT(DISTINCT oi1.invoice_no) as pair_count FROM order_items oi1 JOIN order_items oi2 ON oi1.invoice_no = oi2.invoice_no AND oi1.stock_code < oi2.stock_code GROUP BY oi1.stock_code, oi2.stock_code) SELECT pc.product_a, pc.product_b, pc.pair_count, pa.product_count as count_a, pb.product_count as count_b, ROUND(pc.pair_count * 100.0 / pa.product_count, 2) as confidence_a_to_b, ROUND(pc.pair_count * 100.0 / pb.product_count, 2) as confidence_b_to_a FROM pair_counts pc JOIN product_counts pa ON pc.product_a = pa.stock_code JOIN product_counts pb ON pc.product_b = pb.stock_code WHERE pc.pair_count >= 10 ORDER BY confidence_a_to_b DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 分析每个月的季节性销售模式
sql: WITH monthly_sales AS (SELECT CAST(STRFTIME('%m', o.invoice_date) AS INTEGER) as month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as sales FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY month), avg_monthly_sales AS (SELECT AVG(sales) as avg_sales FROM monthly_sales) SELECT ms.month, ms.sales, ams.avg_sales, ROUND((ms.sales - ams.avg_sales) * 100.0 / ams.avg_sales, 2) as deviation_percentage, CASE WHEN ms.sales > ams.avg_sales * 1.2 THEN '旺季' WHEN ms.sales < ams.avg_sales * 0.8 THEN '淡季' ELSE '平季' END as season_type FROM monthly_sales ms, avg_monthly_sales ams ORDER BY ms.month;

query: 分析不同国家的客户价值分布
sql: WITH customer_value AS (SELECT o.customer_id, o.country, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spent FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id, o.country), country_stats AS (SELECT country, COUNT(*) as customer_count, AVG(total_spent) as avg_customer_value, MIN(total_spent) as min_value, MAX(total_spent) as max_value, SUM(total_spent) as total_revenue FROM customer_value GROUP BY country) SELECT country, customer_count, ROUND(avg_customer_value, 2) as avg_value, ROUND(min_value, 2) as min_value, ROUND(max_value, 2) as max_value, ROUND(total_revenue, 2) as total_revenue, ROUND(total_revenue / (SELECT SUM(total_revenue) FROM country_stats) * 100, 2) as revenue_share FROM country_stats ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

query: 分析价格弹性（不同价格段的销量）
sql: WITH price_bands AS (SELECT CASE WHEN unit_price < 1 THEN '0-1' WHEN unit_price < 5 THEN '1-5' WHEN unit_price < 10 THEN '5-10' WHEN unit_price < 20 THEN '10-20' ELSE '20+' END as price_range, stock_code, AVG(unit_price) as avg_price, SUM(quantity) as total_quantity FROM order_items GROUP BY price_range, stock_code) SELECT price_range, COUNT(DISTINCT stock_code) as product_count, ROUND(AVG(avg_price), 2) as avg_price_in_range, SUM(total_quantity) as total_sales_volume, ROUND(SUM(total_quantity) / COUNT(DISTINCT stock_code), 2) as avg_sales_per_product FROM price_bands GROUP BY price_range ORDER BY avg_price_in_range;

query: 识别交叉销售机会（买了A未买B的客户）
sql: WITH product_a_buyers AS (SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE oi.stock_code = '85123A'), product_b_buyers AS (SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no WHERE oi.stock_code = '71053'), cross_sell_opportunity AS (SELECT customer_id FROM product_a_buyers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM product_b_buyers)) SELECT COUNT(*) as opportunity_count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_a_buyers), 2) as penetration_rate FROM cross_sell_opportunity;

query: 计算商品库存周转率
sql: WITH product_sales AS (SELECT stock_code, COUNT(DISTINCT STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', o.invoice_date)) as sales_days, SUM(oi.quantity) as total_sold FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.invoice_no = o.invoice_no GROUP BY stock_code) SELECT stock_code, total_sold, sales_days, ROUND(total_sold * 1.0 / sales_days, 2) as daily_sales_rate, CASE WHEN total_sold * 1.0 / sales_days > 10 THEN '快速周转' WHEN total_sold * 1.0 / sales_days > 5 THEN '正常周转' ELSE '滞销' END as turnover_status FROM product_sales WHERE sales_days > 0 ORDER BY daily_sales_rate DESC;

query: 分析新客户获客渠道效果（按国家）
sql: WITH first_orders AS (SELECT customer_id, country, MIN(invoice_date) as first_order_date FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id), monthly_new_customers AS (SELECT country, STRFTIME('%Y-%m', first_order_date) as acquisition_month, COUNT(*) as new_customers FROM first_orders GROUP BY country, acquisition_month) SELECT country, acquisition_month, new_customers, SUM(new_customers) OVER (PARTITION BY country ORDER BY acquisition_month) as cumulative_customers FROM monthly_new_customers ORDER BY country, acquisition_month;

query: 基于历史趋势预测下月收入
sql: WITH monthly_revenue AS (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.invoice_date) as month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY month), revenue_growth AS (SELECT month, revenue, LAG(revenue, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) as prev_month_revenue, LAG(revenue, 2) OVER (ORDER BY month) as prev_2month_revenue, LAG(revenue, 3) OVER (ORDER BY month) as prev_3month_revenue FROM monthly_revenue) SELECT month, revenue, ROUND((revenue + prev_month_revenue + prev_2month_revenue) / 3, 2) as ma_3months, ROUND((revenue - prev_month_revenue) * 100.0 / prev_month_revenue, 2) as mom_growth, ROUND(revenue * (1 + (revenue - prev_month_revenue) / prev_month_revenue), 2) as next_month_forecast FROM revenue_growth WHERE prev_3month_revenue IS NOT NULL ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 1;

query: 综合分析：高价值客户的购买模式
sql: WITH high_value_customers AS (SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spent FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY o.customer_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 100), customer_patterns AS (SELECT hvc.customer_id, o.country, COUNT(DISTINCT o.invoice_no) as order_frequency, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as avg_order_value, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.stock_code) as product_variety, STRFTIME('%w', o.invoice_date) as day_of_week, CAST(STRFTIME('%H', o.invoice_date) AS INTEGER) as hour_of_day FROM high_value_customers hvc JOIN orders o ON hvc.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.invoice_no = oi.invoice_no GROUP BY hvc.customer_id, o.country, day_of_week, hour_of_day) SELECT country, ROUND(AVG(order_frequency), 2) as avg_orders, ROUND(AVG(avg_order_value), 2) as avg_basket_size, ROUND(AVG(product_variety), 2) as avg_product_variety, day_of_week, hour_of_day, COUNT(*) as pattern_frequency FROM customer_patterns GROUP BY country, day_of_week, hour_of_day HAVING pattern_frequency > 5 ORDER BY country, pattern_frequency DESC;
